expectations.text: Reports a total endpoint count in the ballpark of 180-200
expectations.evidence: Reports 187 total paths and 256 total operations. 187 paths is in range.

expectations.text: Provides a breakdown by HTTP method
Identifies at least 8 distinct resource groups
expectations.evidence: Lists 18 resource groups with per-method breakdown: /members, /cards, /boards, /organizations, /enterprises, /actions, /checklists, /lists, /notifications, /customFields, /tokens, /labels, /plugins, /webhooks, /search, /applications, /batch, /emoji

expectations.text: Correctly identifies authentication as API key + token query parameters
expectations.evidence: Dedicated Authentication section: 'two API-key query parameters' with table showing APIKey and APIToken via query string

expectations.text: Identifies at least 3 complex schemas with property details
expectations.evidence: Top 10 table with property counts, ref counts, nested objects: Member (42), Card (33), Board (26), Enterprise (18), Prefs (22), etc.

expectations.text: Overview is well-organized with clear sections
expectations.evidence: Clear sections: At a Glance, Authentication, Resource Groups, Complex Schemas, Schema Categories, Parameter Patterns, Key Observations
